hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py && "$FILE" != */vault/writer.py ]]; then if grep -nE '\.(write_text|write_bytes)\(|open\([^)]+[,"]\s*["\x27]w' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Direct file write detected in $FILE — all vault writes must go through vault/writer.py" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == */pipelines/*.py ]]; then if grep -nE 'if .*(confidence|score).*[<>]=?\s+0\.[0-9]' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Hardcoded confidence threshold in $FILE — thresholds belong in config/thresholds.yaml" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == */mcp_server/tools.py ]]; then if grep -nE '^\s+(if |elif |for |while )' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Logic detected in mcp_server/tools.py — move it to the pipeline" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py && "$FILE" != */prompts/* ]]; then if grep -nE 'f["\x27].*(summarize|classify|extract|summarise|prompt|system_prompt)' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Possible hardcoded prompt f-string in $FILE — prompts belong in prompts/*.yaml" >&2; fi; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then if grep -nE '(vault_cfg|\.vault)\.(attachment_path|archive_path)\b' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Removed VaultConfig API in $FILE — use project_attachment()/domain_attachment()/domain_archive() from vault/paths.py" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == */tests/* && "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then if grep -nE '^from core\.config import.*\bCONFIG\b' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⛔ VIOLATION: Module-scope CONFIG import in test $FILE — CONFIG validates vault root at import time; pass db_path=tmp_path/\"kb.db\" explicitly or lazy-import inside the test function." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); if [[ "$FILE" == */tests/* && "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then if grep -nE '"vault\.writer\.(move_note|write_note|delete_by_path|rename|read_note|audit_write)' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "⚠️  WARNING: Patching vault.writer source in $FILE — patch vault.watcher.<name> instead; watcher imports at module top so patching the source leaves watcher pointing at the original. See TD-033." >&2; fi; fi

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE'; then echo '⛔ BLOCKED: Destructive command' >&2; exit 2; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "AI-kms"' 2>/dev/null || true
